title: peutalis nodosa
intro: Peutalis nodosa, also known as Stachytarpheta mutabilis, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Peutalis nodosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Peutalis nodosa can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
